task: Generate a project health report with risk assessment.
output: 1. RAG status (Red/Amber/Green) with justification - Green: on track, no critical blockers, capacity sufficient - Amber: at risk, 1-2 blockers or capacity under 80% - Red: off track, critical blockers or deadline at risk 2. Top 3 risks with probability (High/Medium/Low) and impact 3. Recommended mitigation for each risk 4. Flag: are any risks beyond human PM authority to resolve?
constraint: Mark all AI-generated risk scores as "AI-estimated (unvalidated)" for audit log purposes. Do not make autonomous decisions — surface for human PM review only.
